Name: FAnimUpdateRateParameters
Description:
Container for Animation Update Rate parameters.
  They are shared for all components of an Actor, so they can be updated in sync.

Variables.Name: UpdateRate
Variables.Description: How often animation will be updatedticked. 1 = every frame, 2 = every 2 frames, etc.

Variables.Name: bShouldUseLodMap
Variables.Description: Whether or not to use the defined LODFrameskip map instead of separate distance factor thresholds

Variables.Name: EvaluationRate
Variables.Description:
How often animation will be evaluated. 1 = every frame, 2 = every 2 frames, etc.
	   has to be a multiple of UpdateRate.

Variables.Name: bInterpolateSkippedFrames
Variables.Description: When skipping a frame, should it be interpolated or frozen?

Variables.Name: bShouldUseMinLod
Variables.Description: If set, LODFrameskip map will be queried with mesh's MinLodModel instead of current LOD (PredictedLODLevel)

Variables.Name: bSkipUpdate
Variables.Description: (This frame) animation update should be skipped.

Variables.Name: bSkipEvaluation
Variables.Description: (This frame) animation evaluation should be skipped.

Variables.Name: TickedPoseOffestTime
Variables.Description: Track time we have lost via skipping

Variables.Name: AdditionalTime
Variables.Description: Total time of the last series of skipped updates

Variables.Name: BaseNonRenderedUpdateRate
Variables.Description:
Rate of animation evaluation when non rendered (off screen and dedicated servers).
	  a value of 4 means evaluated 1 frame, then 3 frames skipped

Variables.Name: BaseVisibleDistanceFactorThesholds
Variables.Description:
Array of MaxDistanceFactor to use for AnimUpdateRate when mesh is visible (rendered).
	  MaxDistanceFactor is size on screen, as used by LODs
	  Example:
	 		BaseVisibleDistanceFactorThesholds.Add(0.4f)
	 		BaseVisibleDistanceFactorThesholds.Add(0.2f)
	  means:
	 		0 frame skip, MaxDistanceFactor > 0.4f
	 		1 frame skip, MaxDistanceFactor > 0.2f
	 		2 frame skip, MaxDistanceFactor > 0.0f

Variables.Name: MaxEvalRateForInterpolation
Variables.Description: Max Evaluation Rate allowed for interpolation to be enabled. Beyond, interpolation will be turned off.

Variables.Name: LODToFrameSkipMap
Variables.Description:
Map of LOD levels to frame skip amounts. if bShouldUseLodMap is set these values will be used for
	  the frameskip amounts and the distance factor thresholds will be ignored. The flag and these values
	  should be configured using the customization callback when parameters are created for a component.
	 
	  Note that this is # of frames to skip, so if you have 20, that means every 21th frame, it will update, and evaluate.

Variables.Name: ShiftBucket
Variables.Description: The bucket to use when deciding which counter to use to calculate shift values
